programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Haier Grand Prix continues in Qingdao, China, and features the Aquabike Freestyle and Runabout Divisions.

programme.title: Blue World Ep807: Cave Drift Dive + Triple Wreck Dive
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bird dives a famous, and extremely dangerous, cave in Florida known as Friedman Sink, where divers exit at "Catfish Hotel". Then Blue World heads to the Florida coast where the team explores three shipwrecks on a single dive.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep207: Navigating Montreal’s historic Lachine Canal – Canada
programme.desc: Water Ways TV host Steven Bull works on some boat upgrades in Quebec before navigating Montreal’s historic Lachine Canal.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Argentina Slam
programme.desc: Curtis and Autumn travel to Argentina and catch the Grand Slam of a lifetime!

programme.title: Airtime Ep41: Kayaking The Mighty Rivers of Africa
programme.desc: The world’s top kayakers travel Africa in search of the most dangerous whitewater. Shot over the course of a year, this episode highlights the travel and adventure of world-class kayakers as they embark on a “bigger and better” hunt for the largest waterfalls in a land where emergency services are virtually non-existent.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep601: Paddling Wales – United Kingdom
programme.desc: The Facing Waves team heads to Wales to explore the coast via stand-up paddleboard; surf the legendary Snowdonia inland surf lagoon; and learn the sport of coasteering.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep604: Paddling the Great Calusa Blueway – Florida, USA
programme.desc: Luke Hopkins and Anne Pagano explore one of the world’s great waterway trails via stand-up paddle board...Florida’s Great Calusa Blueway Paddling Trail.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep115: Aquabike World Championship Series - Qingdao, China (Part 2)
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Haier Grand Prix continues in Qingdao, China, and features the Aquabike Freestyle and Runabout Divisions.

programme.title: Blue World Ep807: Cave Drift Dive + Triple Wreck Dive
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bird dives a famous, and extremely dangerous, cave in Florida known as Friedman Sink, where divers exit at "Catfish Hotel". Then Blue World heads to the Florida coast where the team explores three shipwrecks on a single dive.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep207: Navigating Montreal’s historic Lachine Canal – Canada
programme.desc: Water Ways TV host Steven Bull works on some boat upgrades in Quebec before navigating Montreal’s historic Lachine Canal.

programme.title: The Olin Sisters - Pachamama
programme.desc: A sun-drenched short film about soul, surf and sisterhood. Pachamama follows Mathea and Sanoa Olin’s journey to become professional surfers in the harsh coldwater waves off the west coast of Canada. Filmed by director Ross Allen during The Rip Curl Pro Tofino.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Happy Recluse
programme.desc: For many years Pete Devries and Jeremy Koreski have been on a mission to surf the best waves Vancouver Island has to offer. In particular, they return again and over to a wave with potential for a legendary session. In the process, Pete tells of his life as a ”Happy Recluse," at home in cold water.

programme.title: Roxy Presents: New Colors
programme.desc: Faced with the winter waters of Norway, four female professional surfers step out of their comfort zone, push their boundaries and redefine their approach to surfing. Beyond competition sites, they reconnect with the pleasure of sharing their passion through a unique cold water experience.

programme.title: Billabong Presents: The Cape
programme.desc: What happens when good winds, good weather, and a solid swell come together along one of the rawest stretches of coastline on the planet? You don't stop. Surfers Taj Burrow, Shaun Manners, Jaleesa Vincent, and Matt Bromley test their staying power on this Adventure Division strike mission.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: The Backyard
programme.desc: At Pipeline there is flora, fauna, ocean and stone. Volcom Stone. At this point, the Volcom house is practically part of the reef. Between the team, the family, the legacy, the peanut gallery, the respect, the Pipe Pro and the barbecues, you’d be hard pressed not to notice Volcom on the North Shore.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: XO - Coco Ho
programme.desc: Step into the world of pro surfer Coco Ho. Raised on Oahu’s North Shore, the film explores how Ho got started in the water, her surfing family history, and the ups and downs of the Championship Tour. Featuring brother Mason Ho, father Michael Ho, and surfers John John Florence and Stephanie Gilmore.

programme.title: Kaiwi Winds
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Tweakin' On Boards With Ryan Burch
programme.desc: Tweakin’ on Boards was shot in 2009. Seems like a second ago and forever ago. Truth is it’s both. As a surfer and filmmaker, Burch isn’t content complaining everything's already been done. Says fellow surfer Cyrus Sutton, “He needs to FEEL history for himself.” This film is that and more.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Lay Down Your Weapons
programme.desc: “Lay Down Your Weapons” is a respite from the cacophony of the world. Atoms and Void is musician Arlie Carstens, of Seattle’s Juno, and producer Eric Fisher. Known for his skateboarding films, Director Greg Hunt here lets landscapes and cityscapes slowly unfold. Breathe deeply, watch and listen.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 1: Don’t Lie Down
programme.desc: In 1953, W. Horace Carter won the Pulitzer Prize for his editorials opposing the KKK. This brave work lead to the FBI’s takedown of the Carolina Klans. Today, The Carters continue to champion civil rights and the environment. Grandson Wes Carter now fights for the world’s waterways. Don’t lie down.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 2: Plastic, Plastic, Everywhere
programme.desc: We join pro surfer and Journey To A New Earth advocate Koa Smith to learn about the problem of microplastics on Oahu’s North Shore. We explore efforts underway to fix the issue and spotlight a few of the ways entrepreneurs are utilizing the reclaimed materials to develop new innovative products.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 3: Walking the Walk
programme.desc: Ron Artisi has sandy toes. When taking a closer look with the crew from Sustainable Coastlines Hawaii, his world is shattered. Bob Hurley shares the tale of a young woman building an army to clean the rivers in Bali. Wes Carter explores Fishbone Carriers, the alternative to plastic 6-pack rings.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 4: No More Bubbles
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of Journey to a New Earth, Wes Carter of Atlantic Packaging talks with water photographer Clark Little, shaper Jon Pyzel, and big wave rider Kai Lenny. They join the journey, offering insights and solutions for the problematic issue of single-use plastics in the surf industry.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 5: Clean This Mess Up
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we talk with 11x World Surf League Champion, Kelly Slater, about the growing problem of plastic pollution around the world. We learn about the ways he’s chosen to make a difference with his company, Outerknown, and discuss the power of community to make real and lasting change.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 6: Jaws of Consumerism
programme.desc: Olympic Gold Medalist and 5x World Champion, Carissa Moore, shares how people and brands can eliminate single-use plastics. Juan Oliphant and Ocean Ramsey explain how shark populations are a crucial barometer for the health of our oceans. Florence Marine X talks sustainable solutions in packaging!

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 7: Decisions
programme.desc: [object Object]

The British team of Tom McEwen, Mollie Summerland and Georgie Spence are eager to take the first place at home, but Australian Kevin McNab, Sam Griffiths and Sophie Adams are proving to be a worthy rival. Watch the best moments of the Houghton Hall leg at the 2021 FEI Eventing Nations Cup.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Stunts, studs sanctuaries
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we go behind the scenes with The Devil’s Horsemen - a family run company who have been providing horses carriages for the film industry for over 30 years, we break down the art of dressage training at Australia’s Mulawa Performance, and we follow a successful rehabilitation and rehoming story at the Mare Foal Sanctuary in England.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Wild horses Switzerland's jumping prodigy
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we’re taming some of New Zealand’s feral Kaimanawa horses with Kiwi adventurer Chloe Phillips-Harris, aiming for Tokyo and beyond with young Swiss jumper Bryan Balsiger, and swapping machinery for horses at one of Italy’s most environmentally friendly vineyards.

programme.title: Longines FEI Jumping World Cup - Leg1 - Oslo HL
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: time2Rlx - Wildlife
programme.desc: Explore Botswana’s wild landscapes, witnessing lions, giraffes, elephants, and vibrant birdlife in Chobe National Park, and experience thrilling hunts and the beauty of Africa’s nature.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the beauty of the Red Sea’s underwater world, showcasing vibrant fish and rich marine life. Enjoy relaxing background music, perfect for reducing stress, aiding sleep, or simply unwinding after a long day.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the beauty of the Red Sea with our newest underwater video. Relax to the sounds of gentle music while watching colorful fish, coral reefs, and graceful sea turtles. This video is a collection of the best moments from our earlier Red Sea Life series, perfect for calming your mind and reducing stress.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Station Wagons like the Volvo V60 Polestar aren't just family vans anymore but basically very roomy sports cars. Mercedes followed a more luxurious approach with their E43 AMG T model. And: the ultimate powerhouse station wagon, the Audi RS6.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Even though the Mercedes-AMG A45 Performmaster has just four cylinders, its sound is similar to its V8-colleagues by AMG. Also: the car tuning company MTM offers a similarly powerful alternative, based on an Audi: the RS3 R.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: Of what used to be more than 300 tractor manufacturers, only three remain in Germany today. One of them is Deutz. We show the change in tractor construction from the simple tractor to the all-rounder at this traditional company.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: The Fiat 500X, SUV offshoot of the popular 500, is built in Melfi. The plant is one of the most modern in Europe. The FCA Group has invested almost one billion euros in the expansion. Up to 1600 vehicles roll off the production line here every day.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: On Put Your Car On TV, car fans from the Middle East can have their darlings rated in terms of speed, style and sound. Included this time: a Nova SS, a special Honda Accord and a car clad in crystals.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: Car lovers from the Middle East present their vehicles at the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. There is a weekend at the hotel to be won. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette are up for judging this time.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Ferrari 458 Speciale is a street-legal race car that fires up emotion. Driving it is unforgettable, just as it is the case with the McLaren 650S, a car that is as fast as the Ferrari but fascinates more on a technical than emotional level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Lexus was one of the pioneers when it comes to electric and hybrid cars. The brand's LS 600h, the BMW Active Hybrid 7 and the Porsche Panamera S E-Hybrid are prime examples of this mixture between combustion and electric propulsion.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Panamera Turbo S is one of the most dynamic sedans in the world. In addition: the Jaguar XJR power sedan with a 550 hp V8 engine and Mercedes' extraordinary four-door coupe CLS 500.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi once again invite the owners of the most extraordinary cars to Dubai, where they award points for speed, style and sound. This time, they will be joined by a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Because

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 13
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Un día en...Salón Internacional Náutico de Barcelona - Salón Internacional Barcelona - Ep8
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 1
programme.desc: As soon as we arrive on the island, we begin to explore Zanzibar starting in the northern part of the country. Nungwi, our chosen location is a common touristic destination and its guests are famously welcoming. Let's begin our journey by visiting the famous sea turtle conservation and protection center. Buckle up for this adventure!

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Domestic Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Julia are a couple with dark secrets. Blanca is a tortured soul with a past. And Olivia is hellbent on finding the truth. When these four lives intersect, nobody escapes. Bonds are tested; wills are broken; and, metal is forged. It's a tale of survival, trust, and darkness from the creators of Bloody Drama.

programme.title: Satan Claus
programme.desc: With the clock ticking and the body count rising, Homicide Detective Timothy Reynolds reluctantly volunteers to assist his former partner, Detective Alan Fryer, with the investigation to a slew of grisly murders left behind by a mission orientated killer during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Beware the Boogeyman
programme.desc: Dr. Tristian Mackenzie makes her way to a Psychiatric Hospital for the criminally insane, where she learns of the strange series of cases from Dr. Moon.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E02 - Volcano Bay
programme.desc: Charlie Summerville, our guide, is getting things ready at Volcano Bay to set up a camp. He's planning to build a cabin for adventurers seeking some thrill.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E11 - Still On The List
programme.desc: Officers in both the lower and upper peninsula of Michigan work to stop hunters from baiting for bears.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E12 - Kings Hill
programme.desc: Montana - Warden Bryan Golie investigates a call of shots fired on private property during the big game season and is in for one very long night.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E10 - Strange Killings and Dog Help
programme.desc: In "Strange Killings," you'll hear about an incredible tale of chaos out in the wilderness. Then, in "Dog Help," a trusty dog lends a hand to a Game Warden. Game Wardens share some of the most memorable cases and stories from their careers.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E01 - Rookie Pressure
programme.desc: Anthony strives to prove himself as medical lead responding to a snowmobile crash on Togwotee Pass.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E01 - Ice Climbers
programme.desc: Tanalian Aviation battles winter weather to ferry ice climbers onto the Knik Glacier.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E02 - Without a Trace
programme.desc: Tanalian Aviation pilots Joel Natwick and Josiah Freeman assist with a search and rescue for an experienced hiker deep in the winter wilderness.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E08 - Princess Diana The Uncrowned Queen
programme.desc: This show offers a captivating look into the extraordinary life of one of the 20th century's most fascinating women, seen through an American lens. It features clips from the auction where her dresses were sold.

programme.title: Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three successful blind artists whose visual impairment has become the starting point for their visual explorations.

programme.title: Schmitke
programme.desc: What should have been a ordinary job in the Czech Ore Mountains, becomes a mysterious expedition for the aging engineer Julius Schmitke.

programme.title: Honey and Ashes
programme.desc: Naima, a doctor, Amina, a graduate, and Leila, a young student, are pursuing their individual routes to an independent life when their paths cross.

programme.title: Papa Gold
programme.desc: Denny lives in in the city, boozes and dances through the night, and sleeps with one girl after another.

programme.title: In die Welt - Into the World
programme.desc: This moving portrait of a maternity hospital in Vienna provides a fascinating insight into the drama, pain, and beauty of being born into this world.

programme.title: Of Neo-Nazis and Superheroes – How the Far Right is Changing a Small German Town
programme.desc: In the summer of 2017, 6,000 neo-Nazis from all over Europe gathered in Themar for the largest right-wing rock concert of the German post war era.

programme.title: We will survive
programme.desc: At the Julie-Roger-Haus in Frankfurt am Main, a care facility for seniors of all sexual orientations, "grandpa is finally allowed to be gay" (FAZ).

programme.title: Le Ciel, la Terre et L'Homme
programme.desc: The Aït Seghrouchen, a nomadic people from the windswept Moroccan desert, brave sandstorms, watch livestock and the cell phone towers.

programme.title: Blue Summer Symphony
programme.desc: The air smells like summer. A potpourri of suntan lotion lawn and lime blossom fries, of water polo melon and chlorine lemonade hovering in the air.

programme.title: Fall Pinguin
programme.desc: The penguins encounter Swiss alpine cows, swim in the river, walk leisurely through the city center... they are everywhere. An adventure begins.

programme.title: A Cry From Within
programme.desc: Cecile and her family decide to leave NYC for a quieter life away from the city, but soon find themselves victim to evil spirits residing in their new home.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: City Of Vulture
programme.desc: When Short gets out of prison and tries to get his life straight, he is faced with temptations and influences of the hood.

programme.title: City of Vultures 2
programme.desc: A gangster makes moves to take over the Southside of Chicago, but the police are closing in as street violence escalates to devastating levels.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Change in the space industry is accelerating.

programme.title: Stuck
programme.desc: Fiona decides to make it a good day by being kind to everyone in her life.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Gemma gives Rhyme a fake ID. TK and Wes hold auditions for their upcoming movie project.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Ellie gets an unexpected visitor. Rooney has a difficult conversation. Rhyme has a few choice words for Sadie.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Mani assembles the crew. Mr. Mioshi tells his origin story and gives a tour of the Jitterbug factory.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Dylan, Goth Girl, Hank, and Paige compete to win the Jitterbug empire.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Mani is back! The girls deal with boy drama, while Mani confronts his own theatrics.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Tensions between Sky and Harmony boil over onstage as the school play concludes.

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: Will Lizzy and Co. be able to unmask the culprit, or will it be curtains for the theater department?

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: It's dress rehearsal for the Crown Lake drama club, and one student becomes the victim of a tragic accident.

programme.title: Crown Lake
programme.desc: Nellie and Josh hit it off until she learns about long-standing and controversial rule during Treasure Hunt.

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors
programme.desc: When Peter and Nancy split up, their friends plot to bring them back together during a trip to a cabin. But things go hilariously wrong when Peter comes to the cabin with other intentions. A modern day romantic comedy farce.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: Far UV creates autonomous disinfection devices that can assist in containing the inevitable emergence of infectious diseases that can be spread by pathogens on surfaces or through the air. It is under contract with NASA to prevent foodborne illness in space flight and works with the US Army.

programme.title: Thirty the Series
programme.desc: Charlie, Bianca and Anna are on their way to see Dalia, who has fallen off the grid since becoming a mum. While Dalia tries to wrangle herself, a sick child and a grumpy husband.

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: FORTE s a female-founded and led technology company. Launched by Lauren Foundos in 2015, FORTE’s white label streaming platform helps boutique fitness studios, big box gyms and health clubs create premium live and on-demand fitness experiences for members.

programme.title: Thirty the Series
programme.desc: Dalia tries to connect with her child-free mates, Charlie, Anna and Bianca - while giving them a realistic taste of suburban living.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones,

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Could implantable RFID chips or Radio-frequency identification tags currently in widespread use in retail industry be used to surreptitiously track and control people?

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the founders of Architects and Engineers for 911 Truth and Firefighters for 911

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: Margik is creating the future where smart OrganicLEDs enhance our quality of life

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: Mymee has developed a revolutionary technology that helps people manage their autoimmune conditions.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E03 - Episode 03
programme.desc: After something terrible happens, Felicity cooks up a lie that protects her siblings.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E04 - Episode 04
programme.desc: When Andy’s ride-sharing plans are derailed, Stefan steps up and presents a new opportunity for both of them. Lexi is questioned by the police, but the lies and guilt are about to overwhelm her.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E05 - Episode 05
programme.desc: Felicity scrambles to find out why charges against Sefako have been reinstated while Sefako confesses to the murder, and Lexi teeters on the edge.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E06 - Episode 06
programme.desc: Angelique lays a trap for Msizi that someone discovers. A celebratory supper at the Potgieters is interrupted by shocking news.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E07 - Episode 07
programme.desc: After Dineo’s betrayal, the three sisters finally face the consequences of their secrets. As pressure mounts, the sisters’ relationship starts to fracture.

programme.title: Legacy - S06:E08 - Episode 08
programme.desc: As the police arrive, Felicity’s worst nightmare is coming true. SJ makes one last desperate bid for a future with Petra.

programme.title: Legacy - S06:E09 - Episode 09
programme.desc: SJ makes a desperate final plea as Petra prepares to move on with her life for good. Felicity prepares to flee as Dineo closes in on Sebastian’s true resting place…

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: The Steel Claw
programme.desc: A disabled ex-Marine returns to WWII Philippines for a hazardous rescue mission, relying on a steel prosthetic hand and local guerrilla allies.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: There is panic throughout the nation as the dead suddenly come back to life.

programme.title: Hell's Angels
programme.desc: Two British brothers fly in WWI’s fiercest battles, face betrayal over a lover, and sacrifice everything amid sky-high spectacle and tragedy.

programme.title: The Red House
programme.desc: An old man and his sister are concealing a terrible secret from their adopted teen daughter, concerning a hidden abandoned farmhouse, located deep in the woods

programme.title: A Farewell to Arms
programme.desc: An English nurse and an American soldier on the Italian front during World War I fall in love, but the horrors surrounding them test their romance to the limit

programme.title: Captian Kidd
programme.desc: The unhistorical adventures of pirate Captain Kidd revolve around treasure and treachery.

programme.title: DOA
programme.desc: Frank Bigelow, told he's been poisoned and has only a few days to live, tries to find out who killed him and why

programme.title: Premission To Quit
programme.desc: In “Permission To Quit,” Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us to not let our limitations block our potential.

programme.title: Think Like A Reaper
programme.desc: In “Think Like A Reaper,” Pastor Steven Furtick shows us how to think about the outcome while living in the fear, frustration, and fatigue of right now. You’ll be encouraged that God is with you in your hard place, and help is closer than you realize.

programme.title: Don't Let The Attack Distract You
programme.desc: Right when you start to feel some positive momentum in your life, an attack comes out of nowhere. Sound familiar? Pastor Steven uses the parable of the seeds to illustrate what to do when the enemy attacks and how to persevere in your purpose.

programme.title: Don't Let The Funeral Fool You
programme.desc: Don’t let the disappointment of this season cause you to quit growing and relying on God. Have a funeral for your expectations, leave it with God, and let Him open your eyes to what’s next.

programme.title: SO BE IT Episode 1
programme.desc: Official live videos from the album SO BE IT by Elevation Worship.

programme.title: Try Higher
programme.desc: Don’t try harder. In "Try Higher," Pastor Steven Furtick shows us that no matter what obstacle stands in our way, we can bring it to the One who has the power to overcome it.

programme.title: You Can Change The End
programme.desc: You might not be able to change your past, but you can change what happens next. When life feels stuck or uncertain, remember this: the result belongs to God, but your response is still in your hands. You don’t have to control the outcome, just move forward and trust Him with what comes next.

Rosa Blanco and Fausto plan to ally themselves to bring down Ezequiel, but he does not trust her and thinks it is a trap for him and so he decides to ally himself with Ezequiel, with the purpose of murdering Rosa.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Pedro promises Gertrudis that the job will be done that night, but in his own way: with a lethal injection. Ricardo begins to entangle himself in his own web with María Bonita and seems to forget his goal: to discover the woman who cashed his mother's check. Virginia does the math and realizes she is late on her menstrual period. Gertrudis tries to excite Patricia to win over Alberto.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Guillermo knows that Lorena will not kill the lawyer and before she confesses everything to Alberto, he asks Pedro to let him kill the lawyer and his son Alberto. Pedro demands that he manipulate her one more time with the child to force her to do it. Paulina is certain that it was María Balbina who stole the blank check from his wallet.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: A firm Sister Juana seeks Pastora for a conversation, Lara Portillo accepts with interest her proposal.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: María Lourdes, as Prosecutor in the case, asks Judge Montilla for thirty years in prison for Isabel for first degree murder, and ten years for Malena for complicity; asserting that the women are lovers. Alberto comforts Lorena in her grief for the murder of Magda, while he confides that Alfonso suspects that the mastermind of his father's death is his uncle Claudio. Lorena has a new panic attack, as she knows the danger for her son if the truth comes out.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Disguised as a doctor, Nacho visits Azalea in the clinic ready to disconnect her from the equipment that keeps her alive.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raul confides to Mauricio that he fears that if Azalea does not miraculously come out of her coma, the truth of what happened will never be known.

programme.title: OEA NEWS / UCL NEWS DIARIO
programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.desc: Programa que explora fascinantes destinos turísticos y culturas diversas, ofreciendo recomendaciones y experiencias únicas para los amantes de los viajes.

programme.desc: Programa que conecta al público con temas de actualidad global , ofreciendo una visión informada de la "Aldea Global."

programme.title: NOTICIERO UNICANAL
programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cartas contienen pruebas que incriminan a Patricia y a Fausto en el asesinato de Leoncio. Camila tomará decisiones importantes, sobre todo para encontrar las cuatro mujeres que traicionaron a su mamá. Fausto tiene una grave intención: hay que matar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel le confirma a Camila parte de los secretos que oculta: Patricia y su cuñada María Amelia fueron las que denunciaron a su madre. Luciano recibe un sobre que contiene la foto de Camila niña, con su vestidito amarillo, y detrás, una mujer protegiéndola.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cuatro mujeres que destruyeron la vida de Rosa Blanco se reencuentran en una casa vacía. Camila se enfrenta a Fausto acusando a Patricia de ser la asesina de Leoncio. Otra vez un motorizado le advierte que no siga buscando a su mamá y le arrebata la carta.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna.

programme.title: Soy Una Buena Persona
programme.desc: Sabina es una treintañera muy "artista" convencida de que podrá algún día vivir de su arte como diseñadora, actriz, guionista o directora, porque ella está destinada a petarlo. Mientras, como casi toda su generación, malvive gorroneando en casa de sus padres. Pero una noche tiene, por desgracia ajena, una oportunidad de lujo... y no dudará en aprovecharla sin pensárselo demasiado.

programme.title: La Sangre Iluminada
programme.desc: Seis personajes explican su compleja existencia entrelazada. Cada cierto tiempo, debido a matemáticas inexplicables, la vida de estos personajes cambia y ocupan el cuerpo de otro

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Baile Peligroso
programme.desc: Miluska es una cantante, que se gana la vida haciendo shows musicales para un hotel turístico en el sur de Perú. Durante las presentaciones conoce una variedad de empresarios de todo nivel, entre ellos está Don Mauro, un señor respetable, que admira mucho a Miluska, Carlos Reyes, un traficante de mujeres que se hace pasar por empresario. Al ser cliente frecuente del hotel se gana cierta confianza con las chicas, un día le ofrece a Miluska hacer un show para su hotel en otra provincia, pero no sabían que caerían en una trampa difícil de escapar.

programme.title: Codón Es Una Máquina
programme.desc: Dos amigos se reúnen para planear la creación de una película con un equipo de producción filmando el proceso, dos cuarentones con problemitas están muy decididos a hacer la famosa película de la que llevan años hablando. Se vienen tan arriba que hasta ya graban el making of... y hasta están haciendo un casting, aunque no tienen ni guión ni puñetera idea de lo que van a rodar. Y lo peor: no sospechan que están en las manos de un loco peligroso.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.
